channel.title: World
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from World, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scottish Labour leader Anas Sarwar calls on Keir Starmer to stand down
item.description: Sarwar tells press conference: ‘The distraction has to end and the leadership in Downing Street has to change’ UK politics live – latest updates Anas ...

item.title: Planning ahead: the political leadership campaigns that launched too soon
item.description: As ‘Rayner for leader’ site goes live, here are previous instances of politicians jumping the gun Revealed: ‘Rayner for leader’ site briefly went live...

item.title: Iran arrests leading reformists close to the country’s president
item.description: Detentions of senior Reformists Front figures follow criticism of the authorities’ handling of recent protests The head of Iran’s Reformists Front, th...

item.title: Revealed: ‘Rayner for leader’ site briefly went live in January
item.description: Exclusive: angelaforleader.co.uk domain also registered – but MP’s team dismiss unfinished site as ‘fake’ that was created without her knowledge An un...

item.title: Trump claims Bad Bunny’s historic Super Bowl show watched by millions was ‘affront’ to American ‘greatness’ – US politics live
item.description: Puerto Rican musician has been vocal critic of US president, who claimed performance held almost entirely in Spanish was a ‘slap in the face’ Ghislain...

item.title: Celebrity appearances, controversial ads and other Super Bowl takeaways
item.description: Celebrities including Lady Gaga, Cardi B and Jessica Alba joined Bad Bunny's Super Bowl half time show.

item.title: 20 years is a death sentence, says Jimmy Lai's son as British media tycoon jailed by China
item.description: A Hong Kong court sentences the 78-year-old British citizen Jimmy Lai to 20 years in prison after he was found guilty of national security offences la...

item.title: More than 90 flood warnings across UK with more heavy downpours to begin
item.description: The warning covers south-west and south-east England, London and south Wales and lasts until midnight.

item.title: Family-run make-up brand Barry M bought by rival Warpaint
item.description: The cosmetics and nail varnish line was one of the last family-owned make-up firms in the UK.

item.title: Watch: Seattle elated as New England faces a tough loss
item.description: Fans in New England dealt with heartbreak while a joyous and at times raucous celebration broke out in Seattle.
